name: 05-28-stage2-rvv-elementwise-arithmetic-artifact-validator-migration
title: Stage2 RVV elementwise arithmetic artifact validator migration
description: Migrate RVV elementwise arithmetic target artifact semantic and mirror validation from RVVTargetSupportBundle into the target-owned route-family validator registry, covering plain, scalar-broadcast, and directly related strided elementwise artifact validation while keeping RVVTargetSupportBundle as a neutral bridge.
